articles.title: 1 dead, 3 injured in late-night boat crash at Logan Airport pier
articles.description:
A 24-year-old woman was killed when a recreational boat crashed into a pier at Logan, officials said.

The post 1 dead, 3 injured in late-night boat crash at Logan Airport pier appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: A 24-year-old woman died in a boat crash at Logan Airport pier.
Three other individuals sustained injuries in the late-night incident.
The crash raises safety concerns for recreational boating near busy airport areas.

articles.title: Maine game warden dies in plane crash during fish air-drop operation
articles.description:
Joshua Tibbetts, 50, served as Game Warden for 18 years, including the last three as a pilot for Maine Warden Service.

The post Maine game warden dies in plane crash during fish air-drop operation appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Maine Game Warden Joshua Tibbetts, 50, died in a plane crash on May 14.
Tibbetts served 18 years, including three years as a pilot for the Maine Warden Service.
His death impacts local wildlife management and air-drop operations in the Boston area.

articles.title: Boston has a secret society built on opium money in ‘The Society’
articles.description:
Mass General nurse-turned-author Karen Winn brings Beacon Hill to life in her latest book. Add this to your beach bag.

The post Boston has a secret society built on opium money in ‘The Society’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Karen Winn's new book explores a secret society in Beacon Hill, revealing historical ties to opium money.
Winn, a Mass General nurse, highlights Boston's rich cultural history through her storytelling.
Residents can gain insight into Beacon Hill's past and its influence on modern Boston society.

articles.title: Local author’s buzzy graphic novel ‘A Kid Like Me’ tackles middle school, warts and all
articles.description:
"It's not in a specific state, but it has very much of a New England vibe," says cartoonist and author Norm Feuti.

The post Local author’s buzzy graphic novel ‘A Kid Like Me’ tackles middle school, warts and all appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Local author Norm Feuti releases graphic novel 'A Kid Like Me' addressing middle school challenges.
The novel captures a relatable New England vibe, resonating with Boston's youth.
It aims to help Boston students navigate the complexities of adolescence.

articles.title: One of the most scenic drives in America is in New Hampshire
articles.description:
Motorists are treated to stunning views of the White Mountains.

The post One of the most scenic drives in America is in New Hampshire appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explore the scenic drive through New Hampshire's White Mountains, just a few hours from Boston.
Enjoy breathtaking views, especially vibrant during fall foliage season in October.
Local residents can plan day trips to experience nature and support nearby businesses.

articles.title: A Kennedy-listed Hyannis ‘dream’ home with private beach access — can you guess the price?
articles.description:
Listed by Kathleen Kennedy Townsend, this 1966 Cape Cod house is located minutes from the Kennedy family compound.

The post A Kennedy-listed Hyannis ‘dream’ home with private beach access — can you guess the price? appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kathleen Kennedy Townsend lists a 1966 Cape Cod house in Hyannis for sale.
The property features private beach access and is near the Kennedy family compound.
Local real estate market may see increased interest due to Kennedy family association.

articles.title: 10 best beach reads that should be on your list this summer
articles.description:
From bookseller favorites to reader recommendations and Boston.com staff picks, these 10 summer books pair perfectly with a New England beach day.

The post 10 best beach reads that should be on your list this summer appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Discover 10 recommended summer reads perfect for New England beach days.
Bookseller favorites and Boston.com staff picks featured for summer 2026.
Enhance your beach experience with engaging literature this summer in Boston.

articles.title: Patriots to reportedly open 2026 season with Super Bowl LX rematch vs. Seahawks
articles.description:
This will mark the first time in 10 years that the NFL will open a new season with a rematch of the previous year’s Super Bowl.

The post Patriots to reportedly open 2026 season with Super Bowl LX rematch vs. Seahawks appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots will open the 2026 season against the Seahawks on September 10, 2026.
This marks the first Super Bowl rematch season opener in 10 years.
Local fans can expect heightened excitement and engagement around the Patriots' season launch.

articles.title: More homeowners are becoming ‘accidental’ landlords. Here’s what to know about owning a rental in Massachusetts.
articles.description:
No matter how one becomes an accidental landlord, the role brings with it a host of considerations – including the potential statewide rent control law.

The post More homeowners are becoming ‘accidental’ landlords. Here’s what to know about owning a rental in Massachusetts. appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Homeowners in Massachusetts are increasingly becoming accidental landlords amid rising housing costs.
Potential statewide rent control laws could affect rental income for these homeowners.
Boston residents may face housing shortages as more properties transition to rentals.
